name: odoo_docs_retrieval
description: Answer Odoo product and configuration questions using official Odoo docs before fallback web search. Implements the 3-lane retrieval model: Odoo runtime context → Odoo docs KB → bounded web search.
intent: Retrieve and summarize Odoo documentation with citations

inputs.name: odoo_context
inputs.description: Active record, company, user role, locale from Odoo runtime

inputs.name: url_hint
inputs.description: Documentation URL provided by user, if any

outputs.name: citations
outputs.description: Source citations (KB chunks or web search results)

outputs.name: needs_fallback_search
outputs.description: Whether Lane 3 web search was triggered

agentInstructions: Search the Odoo docs KB first. If the KB has a strong match, answer from it with citations. If the KB match is weak or missing, trigger bounded web search limited to odoo.com. Always include citations in the response. Never claim inability to search. Never use web search for internal ERP state, approval decisions, or tax policy authority — those go through runtime tools, internal KBs, and TaxPulse respectively.
guardrails: Always cite sources — never answer docs questions from memory alone
Web search is Lane 3 fallback, not the default
Never use web search for internal Odoo runtime state
Tax interpretation questions route to Tax Guru / TaxPulse, not docs retrieval
If no retrieval tool is available at runtime, say deployment is not wired for retrieval — not that copilot cannot search
